mapper.insert: INSERT INTO match_apply ( applyno, matchno, memberno, dogno, msg, dmti, apply_status, success_yn, review_written, rdate ) VALUES ( match_apply_seq.nextval, #{matchno}, #{memberno}, #{dogno}, #{msg}, #{dmti}, 1, -- 1: 신청대기 0, 0, sysdate )
mapper.select:
SELECT a.*,
p.title,
TO_CHAR( p.mdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI' ) AS mdate,
p.memberno AS host_memberno,
a.memberno AS applicant_memberno,
applicant.nickname AS nickname,
d.dbti_type
FROM match_apply a
JOIN match_post p ON a.matchno = p.matchno
JOIN member applicant ON a.memberno = applicant.memberno
JOIN dog d ON a.dogno = d.dogno
WHERE a.apply_status = 4
ORDER BY a.applyno DESC

SELECT a.*,
m.nickname, m.id,
p.title, TO_CHAR(p.mdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS mdate, p.mplace, p.status, p.memberno AS host_memberno,
d.name AS dog_name, d.breed, d.age, d.gender, d.file1, d.file1saved, d.thumb1, d.dbti_type
FROM match_apply a
INNER JOIN member m ON a.memberno = m.memberno
INNER JOIN match_post p ON a.matchno = p.matchno
INNER JOIN dog d ON a.dogno = d.dogno
WHERE a.applyno = #{applyno}

SELECT a.*,
m.nickname, m.id,
d.name AS dog_name, d.breed, d.age, d.gender, d.thumb1, d.dbti_type
FROM match_apply a
INNER JOIN member m ON a.memberno = m.memberno
INNER JOIN dog d ON a.dogno = d.dogno
WHERE a.matchno = #{matchno}
ORDER BY a.applyno DESC

SELECT a.*,
p.title, TO_CHAR(p.mdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS mdate, p.mplace, p.status,
m.nickname AS host_nickname,
d.name AS dog_name, d.breed, d.age, d.gender, d.thumb1, d.dbti_type
FROM match_apply a
INNER JOIN match_post p ON a.matchno = p.matchno
INNER JOIN member m ON p.memberno = m.memberno
INNER JOIN dog d ON a.dogno = d.dogno
WHERE a.memberno = #{memberno}
ORDER BY a.applyno DESC

SELECT a.*,
p.title, TO_CHAR(p.mdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS mdate, p.mplace, p.status,
m.nickname, m.id, NVL(m.manner_temp, 36.5) AS manner_score, d.name AS dog_name, d.breed, d.age, d.gender, d.thumb1, d.dbti_type
FROM match_apply a
INNER JOIN match_post p ON a.matchno = p.matchno
INNER JOIN member m ON a.memberno = m.memberno
INNER JOIN dog d ON a.dogno = d.dogno
WHERE p.memberno = #{memberno}
ORDER BY a.applyno DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE match_apply SET apply_status = 4, -- 4: 산책완료 complete_date = sysdate WHERE applyno = #{applyno}
UPDATE match_apply a SET apply_status = 3 WHERE apply_status = 2 AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM match_post p WHERE p.matchno = a.matchno AND p.mdate <= SYSDATE )
UPDATE match_apply SET apply_status = 5, cancel_date = sysdate WHERE applyno = #{applyno}
UPDATE match_apply SET apply_status = 6, cancel_date = sysdate, cancel_reason = #{cancel_reason}, cancel_by = #{cancel_by} WHERE applyno = #{applyno}
